text:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/updating-upgrading-freebsdupdate.html

----------
In paragraph 25.2.3 Major and Minor Upgrades:

It is recommended that all installed ports either be removed and re-installed or upgraded later using the ports-mgmt/portupgrade 
---------

This is wrong. There is not need for this in minor upgrades.

Fix: 

Remove the minor upgrades
How-To-Repeat: Read the handbook
